metadata.notes: All variants confirmed by firmware string mining of rofs.img (514k strings) and rofs2.img (616k strings). Only one variant per position is populated per physical unit.

primary.evidence: CenRep string: '# LIS302DL in address 1D' + sensor UID 0x03023B1D in rofs-core:498905-6

alternatives.evidence: Firmware class '20DAccPddSensorADXL340' linked in rofs-core:15275. Alternative BOM part.
alternatives.notes: Different sensitivity range from LIS302DL. Same I2C address. DTS should probe LIS302DL first.

additional_facts.secondary_evidence: CenRep: '# LIS302DL in address 1C' + sensor UID 0x03023B1C in rofs-core:499277-8
additional_facts.description: Two LIS302DL chips at 0x1C and 0x1D confirmed in production. CenRep key 10 = 0x1D (primary), key 4010 = 0x1C (secondary). SA0 pin determines address: HIGH=0x1D, LOW=0x1C.

alternatives.evidence: Firmware class '28DMagnetometerPddSensorAMI305' in rofs-core:15339. Confirmed alternative.
alternatives.notes: Different WHOAMI register value from AK8974. Addresses 0x0C (default) or 0x0E via CAD0 pin — both different from AK8974 0x0F. DTS must probe both. Same software interface (DiPro LDD/PDD driver).

primary.evidence: Nokia project codename 'proxima_osram' in rofs-core:16338. ADDR_SEL0: R2505(0R) to GND -> addr 0x39 fixed. 3x IR LED drive pins match APDS-99xx pinout.

pins.IR_LED: V8004 IR LED, R2506 27R series, VBAT drive

alternatives.evidence: Nokia project codename 'proxima_citizen' in rofs-core:16343. Same DiPro LDD/PDD driver. I2C address TBD.
alternatives.notes: Citizen Finetech Miyota ALS/prox sensor. Different supplier, same SW interface.

alternatives.evidence: Nokia project codename 'proxima_everlight' in rofs-core:16347. Same DiPro LDD/PDD driver.
alternatives.notes: Everlight Electronics ALS/prox sensor. Three suppliers confirmed, all interchangeable.

primary.evidence: NLoader disassembly: probes 0xD6 (8-bit), reads revision reg, revision>>5==2 -> BQ2415x. Format string: 'bq2415%d found, rev:%x, (I2C_%d)'

alternatives.evidence: NLoader format string: 'SMB338%c found, rev:%x, (I2C_%d)'. Same address as BQ2415x.
NLoader format string: 'SMB138%c found, rev:%x, (I2C_%d)'. Same address as BQ2415x.
alternatives.identification: revision register bit 4 clear (and not BQ2415x)

alternatives.evidence: NLoader string: 'Fairchild id check NOT implemented'. Listed but detection not implemented.

variants.notes: All three charger ICs share address 0x6B on I2C2. Only ONE is populated per board. NLoader identifies installed variant at boot via revision register. I2C2 pull-ups: R2045/R2044 = 3.3 kOhm.

primary.evidence: VLL file 'tcm8590md_camera.vll' in firmware-re/core-rofs0/vlls/bcm2727b1/. String analysis rofs-core:15338.

alternatives.evidence: Referenced in firmware strings as alternative BOM part. Nokia codename 'Capone'.
alternatives.notes: Alternative main camera, Sharp sensor module

alternatives.evidence: Referenced in firmware strings as alternative BOM part. Nokia codename 'Capone'.
alternatives.notes: Alternative main camera, ST Microelectronics sensor module

alternatives.evidence: Referenced as previous revision in firmware strings.
alternatives.notes: Earlier silicon revision, superseded by TCM8590MD

primary.type: EDoF (Extended Depth of Field, no autofocus)
primary.evidence: VLL file 'acmemini_camera.vll'. Calls 'platform_gpio_control' directly from VLL. Nokia project codename 'ACMEmini'.
primary.notes: Camera GPIO (flash, power, reset) controlled by BCM2727 VLL firmware, not OMAP3 GPIO

alternatives.evidence: VLL file 'cmnk8en00f_camera.vll' in vlls/bcm2727b1/. Has sensitivity calibration strings.

primary.evidence: DCC certificate 'IV00BCB07A' in firmware-re/dcc/. IVL2/IVL4 certificates for level 2/4.
primary.notes: One of two production silicon steppings

alternatives.evidence: DCC certificate 'IV00BCB179' in firmware-re/dcc/. Separate certificate set.
alternatives.notes: Second production silicon stepping. Both variants run same VLL firmware set.

primary.evidence: Keyboard scan IC with ROW/COLUMN matrix support. IRQN -> IOexp_IRQ (genio44). IOexp_RESETN <- genio42. egpio.dll + TCA8418 match for keyboard scan application.

alternatives.evidence: Listed as alternative in i2c-bus-map.md. Same general GPIO expander function.
alternatives.notes: Simpler GPIO expander without built-in keyboard scan. Would require software scanning.

variants.notes: Drives 11 keyboard row lines (KPY0-10). 8 column lines (KPX0-7) go to RAPUYAMA KEYB bus. Also carries Digi_mic signals and Hall sensor passthrough.

primary.evidence: Firmware: 'DAtmelSensor', 'TouchIcAtmel', 'atmel_qt.dll' in rofs-core. Addr 0x4C assumed (0x4A/0x4B conflict with TWL5031 at 0x48-0x4B).
primary.notes: Exact addr needs I2C scan verification. Could be 0x4D. Kernel supports 0x4A-0x4D.
